positive: A minimalist, highly stylized depiction of a celestial ocean wave cresting over geometrically arranged bioluminescent coral structures. The scene is dominated by deep indigo, vibrant teal, and glowing gold accents. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast between the dark water and the glowing elements. The style should be a fusion of Art Deco geometry and stylized Pacific Northwest totem art, rendered with thick, crisp lines and smooth gradient transitions. Ideal for a repeating, centered apparel print. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, vector art quality, symmetrical composition.
